# Fuel Tracks Technologies

> India's premium GPS vehicle tracking and real-time fuel monitoring platform for transport, logistics, school buses, and industrial fleets.

Fuel Tracks Technologies Pvt Ltd builds IoT hardware (GPS devices, capacitive fuel sensors) and a cloud-based fleet management platform used by 500+ dealers and 10,000+ vehicles across India. Headquartered in Hyderabad, Telangana.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of GPS tracking and fuel monitoring solutions.
- [About](/about): Company story, mission, and India coverage.
- [Products](/products): GPS tracking devices, capacitive fuel sensors, and fleet management software.
- [Services](/services): End-to-end GPS, fuel monitoring, and RFID services.
- [Dealers](/dealers): Dealer program with commissions, training, and protected territories.
- [Contact](/contact): Get a demo, quote, or dealership inquiry.
